name: 3D Card Effect
summary: An immersive 3D card component that creates depth and perspective transformations on hover using mouse-tracking technology and CSS 3D transforms for modern, interactive interfaces.
detailedDescription: The 3D Card Effect component transforms static card interfaces into dynamic, interactive experiences that respond to user mouse movements with realistic three-dimensional transformations. This sophisticated component calculates the cursor position relative to the card's center point and applies corresponding rotateX and rotateY CSS transforms, creating a convincing illusion of depth and physical presence. The effect mimics how a real object would tilt when viewed from different angles, making digital interfaces feel more tangible and engaging. Perfect for product showcases, portfolio displays, feature grids, and testimonial cards, this component adds a premium layer of interactivity that captures user attention and creates memorable moments. The implementation leverages GPU-accelerated CSS transforms for smooth 60fps performance, ensuring the effect feels fluid and responsive across devices. Visual realism is enhanced through dynamic shadow effects that shift with the card's angle, simulating realistic light interaction. The component includes configurable rotation intensity limits, smooth transition easing, and automatic reset behavior when the cursor exits the card area. Built with accessibility in mind, it respects reduced-motion preferences and degrades gracefully to static cards when animations are disabled.
purpose: Transform flat card interfaces into immersive 3D experiences that respond to user interaction
Increase user engagement and time-on-page through novel hover-based interactions
Add premium visual polish to product showcases, portfolios, and feature highlights
Create memorable micro-interactions that differentiate your interface from competitors
Provide tactile feedback that makes digital content feel more physical and tangible
behavior: Continuously tracks mouse cursor position relative to card center coordinates
Calculates rotation angles for rotateX and rotateY transforms based on cursor offset
Applies smooth CSS 3D transforms with configurable maximum rotation degrees
Dynamically adjusts shadow position and intensity to match card tilt angle
Transitions smoothly between states using cubic-bezier easing functions
Automatically returns to neutral 0-degree position when cursor leaves card boundaries
Respects prefers-reduced-motion media query for accessibility compliance
visualCharacteristics: Three-dimensional depth with realistic perspective transformation
Interactive and responsive to real-time mouse movement
Dynamic shadow casting that shifts with card angle
Premium and polished appearance with smooth motion
Engaging and attention-grabbing without overwhelming content
Modern aesthetic that conveys technical sophistication
recommendations: Use as a focal animated accent and pair with calmer surrounding components.
Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
